title: Richly Flavored Turkish Radish Borek
description: A cultured and chewy Turkish dish featuring radish, perfect for a midnight craving, made with dairy-free friendly ingredients in a borek form.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the grated radish, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Layer the phyllo dough in a large baking dish, brushing each layer with olive oil.
Spoon the radish mixture onto the phyllo dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the phyllo dough over the filling to form a triangle or square shape.
Brush the top of the borek with olive oil and sprinkle with nutritional yeast if using.
Bake the borek for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the borek from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
